comparison_spec.description: Aligned x-axis SQR family that gives the echo sequence its best-case symmetry setting.
comparison_spec.formula: theta_n = min(0.28 pi + 0.18 pi n, 0.92 pi), phi_n = 0

load_instructions: Load `chi_only_aligned_x_na3_chiT3p0_echo_opt_ideal.json` as JSON and inspect the documented result rows and metadata.

segment_1_spec.description: First echoed active segment with original azimuths.
segment_1_spec.formula: theta_n = min(0.28 pi + 0.18 pi n, 0.92 pi), phi_n = 0

segment_2_spec.description: Second echoed active segment with toggling-consistent conjugated azimuths.
segment_2_spec.formula: theta_n = min(0.28 pi + 0.18 pi n, 0.92 pi), phi_n = 0
